<|user|>
Why is Prednisone a prescription-only medicine in the Philippines?</s>
<|assistant|>
Prednisone is a prescription Corticosteroid (Systemic) used for: inflammatory conditions, allergic reactions, asthma exacerbations, autoimmune disorders, certain cancers. This requires a valid prescription from a licensed doctor in the Philippines. Do not self-medicate. Consult your doctor for proper diagnosis and treatment.

<|user|>
Restricted ba ang Ondansetron Generic dahil nakaka-addict?</s>
<|assistant|>
Ang Ondansetron ay isang prescription 5-HT3 Receptor Antagonist (Antiemetic) na ginagamit para sa: nausea and vomiting (chemotherapy, postoperative, radiation), hyperemesis gravidarum. Kailangan ito ng valid na reseta mula sa lisensyadong doktor sa Pilipinas. Huwag mag-self-medicate. Kumonsulta sa doktor para sa tamang diagnosis at pagpapagamot.
